title: [Shadow Valley, Shaman's Hut]
description: A warped hut stands half-embedded in the darkness, its walls stitched from shadows and veined with faint silver light.  The interior feels cold but is lit by lanterns that burn with no visible flame, their ghostly glow throwing rippling silhouettes that never quite match their sources.  Glass jars line crooked shelves, each holding fragments of bone or swirling smoke.  Strange sigils creep across the floor, fading and reappearing as if alive, while a reed bed rests nearby, its surface damp with frost.
